title: IMG Shareholders Praise Exceptional Performance, Approve Capital Raising Plan - FinancialEDGE
description: Industrial and Medical Gases (IMG) Nigeria Plc's shareholders have commended the board and management for the company's outstanding performance in the financial year ended December 31, 2024. The shareholders' appreciation was expressed at the company's 65th Annual General Meeting (AGM) and Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) held in Lagos. just as they pleadge to support the
html: Industrial and Medical Gases (IMG) Nigeria Plc’s shareholders have commended the board and management for the company’s outstanding performance in the financial year ended December 31, 2024.
